---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
anchor-sections: false
execute:
  freeze: auto
---

::: {.page-band .page-band-subtle}
[07 — CV of Failures]{.label}

::: {.h1}
Everything I applied for and didn't get
:::

"Keeping a visible record of your rejected applications can help others to deal with setbacks." --- Melanie Stefan, *Nature*, 2010. Most of what I try fails. This page documents that.
:::

::: {.cv-body}

```{r setup}
#| include: false
source("R/cv-helpers.R")
cv <- load_cv()
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis
render_cv_negatives(cv$cv_negatives)
```

:::
